tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $98.57 (TradingView Jun 3, +4.3% from Jun 2; third consecutive up on Qeshm strike + Kuwait airport attack). Jun 3: US strikes Qeshm Island; Iran drone hits Kuwait airport (1 killed); Rubio rejects Hormuz-linked deal. Stress (48%) + Tail (42%) = 90% continued disruption pricing. Conviction raised to high on Qeshm escalation + triple escalation day. Stop-loss: Brent sub-$85 on confirmed talks resumption + de-escalation. Qeshm strike removes any near-term de-escalation pathway.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $98.57 (Jun 3, +4.3%); ASEAN Energy ~130.0 est. (+1.6%); ASEAN Banks ~186.0 est. (-2.1%); iTraxx Asia IG ~195bp (+13bp on Qeshm escalation). Jun 3: US strikes Qeshm Island; Iran hits Kuwait airport. Rubio rejects Hormuz-linked deal. Tail 42% (up from 35%). Qeshm escalation: energy equities rebound further from oversold, banks sell off. Energy/bank divergence trade strengthened by triple escalation day. Conviction raised to high.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Increase Exposure on Talks Suspension
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~57.60 est. (+0.7% on risk-off from Qeshm escalation). Jun 3: US strikes Qeshm Island; Iran hits Kuwait airport; Rubio rejects Hormuz-linked deal. Tail 42% (up from 35%) justifies increased USD Call/PHP Put overlay. Qeshm strike removes near-term deal hope — PHP vulnerable to oil spike + risk-off. Nuclear sequencing + Strait sovereignty + $12B frozen assets impasse now wider than ever. Stop-loss: confirmed talks resume + mine clearance (below 56.00). Conviction raised to high on triple escalation.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Increase Exposure on Talks Suspension
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~16,700 est. (+0.6% on Qeshm escalation). Brent $98.57 (Jun 3, +4.3%) — ICP overshoot ~$29/bbl vs $70 budget. Jun 3: US strikes Qeshm Island; Iran hits Kuwait airport; Rubio rejects Hormuz deal. Tail 42%: collapse drives IDR sharply weaker on Brent spike. Qeshm strike removes near-term IDR recovery catalyst. Stop-loss: USD/IDR 16,400 (confirmed talks resume + P&I). Conviction raised to high on triple escalation.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold; Widen at 185bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~195bp (+13bp Jun 3 on Qeshm escalation); ASEAN HY ~580bp (+25bp). US strikes Qeshm Island; Iran hits Kuwait airport; Rubio rejects Hormuz-linked deal (Jun 3) — credit optimism dead. Tail 42% (up from 35%): deal collapse drives iTraxx 230-260bp. Stress (48%): stabilises 185-210bp — well above prior 160bp. Triple escalation day removes any tightening catalyst. Hold protection; remove at confirmed talks resumption + mine clearance. Conviction raised to very high on Qeshm strike.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Physical Supply Lag
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM $18.81 est. (Platts May 22 carried); TTF €49.50 (TradingView Jun 3, +11.2% from €44.50 carried). US strikes Qeshm Island (Jun 3) — deal timeline extension + TTF spike supports JKM-TTF premium narrowing (TTF catching up). Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing ~6 months regardless. Stress target $17-21 JKM; tail $24-28. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + Ras Laffan restart timeline. Conviction raised to high on TTF spike narrowing premium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~195bp (+13bp Jun 3 on Qeshm escalation). US strikes Qeshm Island; Iran hits Kuwait airport — deal window collapsed. Execute any residual private placements now before Qeshm escalation triggers full market repricing. Tail 42%: collapse targets 230-260bp.

Brent $98.57 (Jun 3, +4.3% on Qeshm escalation); THB ~33.10 est. (+0.9% on risk-off); Thailand 10Y ~2.25% est. (+7bp); tail 42% (up from 35% on triple escalation). Brent surging on Qeshm strike — PTTEP EBITDA benefits sustained. Execute USD H2 prefunding immediately. Window closed sharply: Qeshm strike + Kuwait airport attack = full tail pricing.

iTraxx Asia IG ~195bp (+13bp on Qeshm escalation); USD/SGD ~1.2670 (+0.2% risk-off); Brent $98.57 (Jun 3, +4.3%). US strikes Qeshm Island; Iran hits Kuwait airport — deal window collapsed. Execute revolving-credit extension now: tail (42%) collapse scenario targets 230bp+; Qeshm strike removes any tightening catalyst. Full USD hedging: SGD weakening on risk-off reduces hedge cost.

ASEAN HY ~580bp (+25bp on Qeshm escalation); Brent $98.57 (Jun 3, +4.3%). US strikes Qeshm Island — tail risk materialising. Window for Hyflux restructuring closed further. Desalination power cost elevated on Brent $98.57. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms immediately. Tail (42%): collapse pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp.
